name: hive
description: Scaffold and run HIVE (Hub-based Intelligence & Verified Execution): verified execution, structured shared state, and an interpretable .hive/ layer for Claude Code. Five hubs — Intent, Ground, Compose, Verify, Deliver — with explicit orchestration.
author: Mart1M

commands.name: hive-init
commands.description: Scaffold the full .hive/ directory structure in the current project

commands.name: hive-run
commands.description: Run the full HIVE pipeline (Intent → Ground → Compose → Verify → Deliver)

commands.name: hive-intent
commands.description: Run the Intent Hub in isolation — parse a raw request into structured intention

commands.name: hive-ground
commands.description: Run the Ground Hub in isolation — gather knowledge before composition

commands.name: hive-compose
commands.description: Run the Compose Hub in isolation — build a structured solution from intent + ground

commands.name: hive-verify
commands.description: Run the Verify Hub in isolation — validate the composition before delivery

commands.name: hive-deliver
commands.description: Run the Deliver Hub in isolation — produce code, specs, or docs from the verified blueprint

commands.name: hive-status
commands.description: Display the current HIVE pipeline state for the active session
